summary: Tested Manage Product Options Modal Redesign - All 7 features verified. Backend APIs: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend UI: All tabs (Categories, Filters, Specifications) working correctly with sync indicator and product group filtering.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Manage Product Options Modal features working. Session expiry is a KNOWN ISSUE - re-login frequently required. The modal is opened via: Supplier Products → Select products → Edit Categories → Manage Options button.

1_modal_has_3_tabs.details: Modal shows Categories (8), Filters (14), Specifications (3) tabs as designed
1_modal_has_3_tabs.evidence: Screenshots show all 3 tabs with correct counts

2_categories_tab_shows_nav_structure_dat.details: Categories tab shows same categories as Navigation & Structure: Floor Tiles, Wall Tiles, Wall & Floor Tiles, Bathroom Tiles, Kitchen Tiles, Outdoor Tiles, Mosaic Tiles, Clearance

3_filters_tab_with_add_delete.details: Filters tab shows: Color (24 values), Country of Origin (10 values), Edge (6 values), Features (7 values), and more. Each filter has 'Add new...' input field and + button
3_filters_tab_with_add_delete.evidence: Screenshot shows expandable filter groups with values and add inputs

4_specifications_tab.details: Specifications tab shows 3 groups: Physical Properties, Appearance, Technical - each marked as Active

5_product_group_selector.details: Working on: selector shows All Groups, Tiles (selected), Underfloor Heating, Flooring, Materials, Tools, Accessories
5_product_group_selector.evidence: Screenshot shows product group selector buttons at top of modal

6_sync_indicator.details: Header shows 'Synced with Navigation & Structure' badge. Footer shows 'Live Sync Enabled • Changes sync with Navigation & Structure' and 'Open Navigation & Structure' link

7_add_delete_filter_values_sync.details: Backend endpoints verified: POST /api/filters/types/{slug}/add-value and DELETE /api/filters/types/by-slug/{slug}/values/{value_slug} both exist and return expected responses
7_add_delete_filter_values_sync.evidence: Pytest test_add_filter_value_endpoint_exists and test_delete_filter_value_endpoint_exists both passed

known_issues.session_instability: Admin session expires frequently requiring re-login. This is a known issue mentioned by main agent.
